---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

Linear mixed models assume your response (or dependent) variable is normally distributed. Generalized linear mixed models do not; instead you have to provide a suitable distribution i.e., negative binomial and link function for your data.

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
# BiocManager::install("apeglm")
library(apeglm)

# txi_organ <- readRDS("tximport_gene_level.rds")
txi_organ <- readRDS("bgee_gtex_tximport_gene_level.rds")
sample_metadata_organ <- read.csv("sample_metadata_organ.csv", row.names = 1)

# Remove missing samples from metadata
samples_to_remove <- c("SRX199102", "SRX203502", "SRX203861", "SRX203933",
                       "SRX204005", "SRX204033", "SRX204068", "SRX204072")

sample_metadata_organ <- sample_metadata_organ %>%
  filter(!rownames(.) %in% samples_to_remove)


# Extract age 
if (!"age" %in% colnames(sample_metadata_organ)) {
  sample_metadata_organ$age <- scale(
  as.numeric(sub("age: ", "", sample_metadata_organ$infoStage))
)
}

sample_metadata_organ$sex     <- as.factor(sample_metadata_organ$sex)
sample_metadata_organ$side    <- as.factor(sample_metadata_organ$side)
sample_metadata_organ$SMCENTER <- as.factor(sample_metadata_organ$SMCENTER)


nrow(sample_metadata_organ)
unique(sample_metadata_organ$SMTS_refined)
```


```{r check covariates}

check_gtex_covariates <- function(meta, organ_name) {
  meta_org <- meta %>% filter(SMTS_refined == organ_name)
  
  # Sex-limited organs
  is_sex_limited <- organ_name %in% c("Testis", "Ovary")
  
  # Check sex
  sex_counts <- table(meta_org$sex)
  use_sex <- !is_sex_limited && length(sex_counts) >= 2 && all(sex_counts >= 3)
  
  # Check age
  use_age <- !all(is.na(meta_org$age)) && 
             length(unique(meta_org$age[!is.na(meta_org$age)])) > 1
  
  # Check side
  side_counts <- table(meta_org$side)
  use_side <- length(side_counts) == 2 && all(side_counts >= 3)
  
  cat("\n", organ_name, ":\n")
  cat("  Samples:", nrow(meta_org), "\n")
  if (is_sex_limited) cat("  Sex-limited organ\n")
  cat("  Sex usable:", use_sex, "\n")
  cat("  Age usable:", use_age, "\n")
  cat("  Side usable:", use_side, "\n")
  
  return(list(use_sex = use_sex, use_age = use_age, use_side = use_side))
}

organs <- unique(sample_metadata_organ$SMTS_refined)
covariate_info <- list()

for (org in organs) {
  covariate_info[[org]] <- check_gtex_covariates(sample_metadata_organ, org)
}
```

```{r DESeq2 per organ}

run_gtex_organ <- function(organ_name, meta, txi_data, cov_info) {
  
  # Filter organ
  meta_org <- meta %>% filter(SMTS_refined == organ_name)
  meta_org$SMCENTER <- as.factor(meta_org$SMCENTER)
  samples <- rownames(meta_org)
  
  # Build design
  design_terms <- c()
  if (cov_info$use_age) design_terms <- c(design_terms, "age")
  if (cov_info$use_sex) design_terms <- c(design_terms, "sex")
  center_counts <- table(meta_org$SMCENTER)
  use_center <- length(center_counts) >= 2 && 
              nrow(meta_org) >= 10
  if (use_center) {
    design_terms <- c(design_terms, "SMCENTER") 
    }
  if (cov_info$use_side) design_terms <- c(design_terms, "side")
  
  if (length(design_terms) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  design_formula <- as.formula(paste("~", paste(design_terms, collapse = " + ")))
  cat("Design:", as.character(design_formula), "\n")
  cat("Samples:", nrow(meta_org), "\n")
  
  # Create DESeq2 object
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(
    txi = list(
      counts = txi_data$counts[, samples],
      abundance = txi_data$abundance[, samples],
      length = txi_data$length[, samples],
      countsFromAbundance = txi_data$countsFromAbundance
    ),
    colData = meta_org,
    design = design_formula
  )
  
  # Run DESeq2
  keep <- rowSums(counts(dds)) >= 10
  dds <- dds[keep, ]
  
  dds <- DESeq(dds)
  # dds <- nbinomWaldTest(dds, maxit = 500)
  
  n_nonconverged <- sum(!mcols(dds)$betaConv, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (n_nonconverged > 0) {
    cat("  Non-converged genes:", n_nonconverged, "\n")
  }
  
  # Check what coefficient names exist
  cat("Available coefficients:", paste(resultsNames(dds), collapse = ", "), "\n")
  
  # Extract results for each coefficient with LFCshrinkage
  results_list <- list()
  
  # Side (if in model)
  if (cov_info$use_side) {
    res_side <- lfcShrink(dds, coef = "side_R_vs_L", type = "apeglm") 
    n_sig <- sum(res_side$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
    cat("  Side:", n_sig, "significant genes\n")
    
    results_list[["side"]] <- as.data.frame(res_side) %>%
      mutate(gene = rownames(res_side),
             variable = "side",
             species = "Homo_sapiens",
             organ = organ_name) %>%
      dplyr::select(species, organ, variable, gene, log2FoldChange, pvalue, padj)
  }
  
  # Age (if in model)
  if (cov_info$use_age) {
    res_age <- lfcShrink(dds, coef = "age", type = "apeglm")
    n_sig <- sum(res_age$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
    cat("  Age:", n_sig, "significant genes\n")
    
    results_list[["age"]] <- as.data.frame(res_age) %>%
      mutate(gene = rownames(res_age),
             variable = "age",
             species = "Homo_sapiens",
             organ = organ_name) %>%
      dplyr::select(species, organ, variable, gene, log2FoldChange, pvalue, padj)
  }
  
  # Sex (if in model)
  if (cov_info$use_sex) {
    sex_coef <- resultsNames(dds)[grepl("sex", resultsNames(dds), ignore.case = TRUE)]
    if (length(sex_coef) > 0) {
      res_sex <- lfcShrink(dds, coef = sex_coef[1], type = "apeglm")
      n_sig <- sum(res_sex$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
      cat("  Sex:", n_sig, "significant genes\n")
      
      results_list[["sex"]] <- as.data.frame(res_sex) %>%
        mutate(gene = rownames(res_sex),
               variable = "sex",
               species = "Homo_sapiens",
               organ = organ_name) %>%
        dplyr::select(species, organ, variable, gene, log2FoldChange, pvalue, padj)
    }
  }
  
  return(results_list)
}
```


```{r Run for all organs}

all_gtex_results <- list()

for (org in organs) {
  results <- run_gtex_organ(org, sample_metadata_organ, txi_organ, covariate_info[[org]])
  if (!is.null(results)) {
    all_gtex_results[[org]] <- results
  }
}

# Combine all results
gtex_results <- bind_rows(lapply(all_gtex_results, bind_rows))

# Save
saveRDS(gtex_results, "bgee_gtex_combined_model_results.rds")
# write.csv(gtex_results, "bgee_gtex_combined_model_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r summary}

summary_gtex <- gtex_results %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 1) %>%
  group_by(organ, variable) %>%
  summarise(
    n_genes = n(),
    mean_log2FC = mean(abs(log2FoldChange)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(organ, variable)

print(summary_gtex)
write.csv(summary_gtex, "summary_gtex_combined_model.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```
